description: Style NoteKamasutra deodorant for men is a versatile fragrance that goes for any occasion. Spray some on when you're hitting the gym or crashing at a friend's place. It will not overpower that expensive perfume or aftershave you're dabbing on so you can use this purely to stay BO-free even on date nights or a corporate meeting. Product DetailsKamasutra Rush is a deodorant for men that comes in an aerosol spray canister that has a shiny silver topCautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize   150 ml
